user.title: ElternPortal Login
user.description: Enter your ElternPortal credentials. The school slug is the subdomain of your school (e.g. 'gymnasium-musterstadt' from gymnasium-musterstadt.eltern-portal.org).

child.title: Child Name
child.description: Enter a name or short code for your child. This determines the sensor entity IDs (e.g. 'SFG' → sensor.aegymuc_sfg_schulaufgaben). Leave empty for auto-detection from the portal.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate ElternPortal
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {school_slug} ({username}) are no longer valid. Please enter the new password.

init.title: ElternPortal Options
init.description: Change the child name used in sensor friendly names. Note: Entity IDs are set during initial setup and cannot be changed here.
